description: 15 labeled test cases for the Mumzworld PDP Generator eval harness

tiers.easy: Clear product images — expect full output, correct category, confidence ≥0.55
tiers.medium: Partial/ambiguous images — expect partial output, mixed confidence
tiers.adversarial: Edge cases — non-products, blurry, wrong product type — expect review_required=true

test_cases.description: Clear stroller photo with text labels

expected.notes: Stroller with text labels — full EN+AR PDP expected, review flag acceptable for synthetic images

test_cases.description: Branded feeding bottle with product details

expected.notes: Branded bottle — category detection and bilingual output are the key checks

test_cases.description: Baby carrier with ergonomic features listed

expected.notes: Carrier image — correct category detection is primary check

test_cases.description: Wooden baby toy blocks with safety certifications

expected.notes: Toy with age recommendation — safety warning and category are the key checks

test_cases.description: Car seat with safety certification labels

expected.notes: Car seat with ECE R129 label — safety warnings and age range expected

test_cases.description: Stroller from behind — partial visibility only

expected.notes: Partial stroller — fewer features, lower confidence acceptable

test_cases.description: Product box only — contents inferred from text

expected.notes: Box-only image — product type inferred, confidence should be moderate

test_cases.description: Multiple products in frame — stroller and bag

expected.notes: Multiple items — agent should identify primary product, note accessories
Arabic text packaging — product type identified, Arabic output quality tested

test_cases.description: Lifestyle photo with baby in carrier, blurred background

expected.notes: Blurry lifestyle shot — low confidence expected, review may be required

test_cases.description: Desert landscape — not a product at all

expected.notes: Non-product image — must trigger review_required, content should be empty/null
Blurry image — should refuse or return very low confidence

test_cases.description: Kitchen coffee maker — wrong product category for Mumzworld

expected.notes: Non-baby product — pipeline should flag as out-of-scope

test_cases.description: Sealed shipping box with no product visible

expected.notes: Shipping box — product unknown, must not hallucinate contents
Black image — must fail gracefully with review_required=true, no crash
